comment: Thank you! It's working now. I give 4 stars because of the floating icon that always stays on the screen. It's very inconvenient. Would be great to bring the old feature back when it appears only when you copy the text. Thank you.
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
